title: All text must use Arial font
Avoid ampersand (&) in Visio diagrams - use 'and' instead
Brand names: capitalise brand, not description
Captions must not start with articles (A, The)
expected_value: Avoid starting captions with A or The

title: Avoid 'and/or' - use 'X or Y or both' instead
expected_value: Replace and/or with 'X or Y or both'

title: Don't capitalise initialism source words unless proper noun
expected_value: subject matter expert (SME) not Subject Matter Expert

title: Do not use 'etc.' alongside i.e. or e.g.
expected_value: Remove etc. when used with i.e. or e.g.

title: Don't begin sentence with an abbreviation (except organisation names)
expected_value: Spell out abbreviation at start of sentence

title: Do not use 'feel' in technical context
Don't break number and unit at end of line
expected_value: Keep number and unit on same line

title: Don't introduce initialism if used fewer than 3 times (<20pp) or 5 times (>20pp)
Capitalise document/section titles on first reference, lowercase thereafter
expected_value: Draft Data Collection Report... then 'the report'

title: Avoid forward slash - use words instead
expected_value: Use words instead of / to avoid ambiguity

title: Always hyphenate prefixes all-, ex-, quasi-, self-
Avoid using dash to substitute for 'to' in ranges (except tables)
expected_value: Use 'to' not dash in ranges in text

title: Consistent terminology - don't refer to same thing differently
expected_value: E.g. don't mix 'plan' and 'strategy' for same document

title: Date format in text: DD MONTH YEAR (e.g., 01 February 2015)
Bulleted list items must use parallel structure
expected_value: Consistent verb form across all items in a list

title: Do not begin a sentence with e.g. or i.e.
expected_value: e.g. and i.e. must not start sentences

title: Check for homophone misuse (their/there/they're, site/sight, etc.)
Do not abbreviate minimum, maximum, approximately
Captions must not end with a period
expected_value: No full stop at end of caption

title: Consistent font usage throughout document
expected_value: No mixed fonts where same font expected

title: Fields of study lowercase unless from proper noun
Figure/table captions must appear above the figure/table
Figure/table captions: capitalise nouns/verbs, lowercase conjunctions/prepositions
expected_value: Initial caps on nouns/verbs, lowercase articles

title: Figures and tables must have captions
Govt bodies: full name capitalised, partial title lowercase
Hyphenate: in-depth, in-house, in-line, in-place, in-service, in-text
expected_value: in-depth, in-house, in-line, in-place, in-service, in-text

title: Initialisms must be expanded on first use, then short form thereafter
Job titles only capitalised when with person's name
Latin species names in italics within parentheses on first reference
expected_value: Common name (Latin name) on first use, common name thereafter

title: List introductory sentence must end with colon (unless section heading)
Max 2 consecutive hyphenated line-ends
expected_value: No more than 2 consecutive lines ending with hyphens

title: No contractions in formal text - use 'cannot' not 'can't'
No contractions in formal text - use 'could not' not 'couldn't'
No contractions in formal text - use 'did not' not 'didn't'
No contractions in formal text - use 'do not' not 'don't'
No contractions in formal text - use 'does not' not 'doesn't'
No contractions in formal text - use 'has not' not 'hasn't'
No contractions in formal text - use 'have not' not 'haven't'
No contractions in formal text - use 'is not' not 'isn't'
No contractions in formal text - use 'should not' not 'shouldn't'
No contractions in formal text - use 'will not' not 'won't'
No contractions in formal text - use 'would not' not 'wouldn't'
No double spaces between words or sentences
No hyphen: offsite, online, onsite, offline
No outstanding comments in document
expected_value: All comments must be resolved before submission

title: No widow or orphan lines
expected_value: No isolated lines at top/bottom of page

title: Non-verb list items: lowercase, no punctuation
expected_value: Lowercase, no end punctuation for non-verb items

title: Numbers below 10 should be spelled out in text
Organisations referred to in third person singular ('the team is' not 'the team are')
Process Map - Activity Guide References Included
expected_value: Activity Guide references shall be included where applicable

title: Process Map - Activity Reference Format XX-000001
Process Map - All 5 Swim Lanes Required
expected_value: All five swim lanes must be present: New Hospitals Programme, NHS, Healthy Delivery Partnership, Delivery Team, Contractor/Supply Chain

title: Process Map - Bottom Line Process Name Required
expected_value: Process name must be present at bottom

title: Process Map - Box Body Concise Description
expected_value: Box body must be concise description without role ownership

title: Process Map - Box Headers One Word or Short Sentence
expected_value: Each box header shall be one word or short sentence

title: Process Map - Contractor Lane Color
expected_value: Boxes in Contractor/Supply Chain lane use lane color in header

title: Process Map - Decision Arrows Have YES/NO Labels
expected_value: Arrows from decision points must contain YES or NO

title: Process Map - Decision Points Use Diamond Shapes
expected_value: Decision points must use diamond shapes

title: Process Map - Delivery Team Lane Color
expected_value: Boxes in Delivery Team lane use lane color in header

title: Process Map - Feedback Activity Required
expected_value: Must contain feedback activity at end

title: Process Map - Healthy Delivery Partnership Lane Color
expected_value: Boxes in Healthy Delivery Partnership lane use lane color in header

title: Process Map - Interface Boxes Dark Grey
Process Map - Multi-Lane Activities Grey Color
Process Map - New Hospitals Programme Lane Color
expected_value: Boxes in New Hospitals Programme lane use lane color in header

title: Process Map - NHS Lane Color
expected_value: Boxes in NHS lane use lane color in header

title: Process Map - RIBA Stage Gates Format
expected_value: Stage Gates must follow RIBA Plan of Work format

title: Process Map - Set Up or Start Activity Required
Process Map - Top Line Workstream Name Required
expected_value: Workstream name must be present at top

title: Process Map - Underlined Headers Need Activity Guide
expected_value: Underlined box headers must have corresponding Activity Guide

title: Professional tone appropriate to document purpose and audience
expected_value: No informal language in formal documents

title: Project phases: Use G0-G1, G2-G4, G5 notation consistently
Proper noun derivations must be capitalised (Welsh, European, Japanese)
Reference codes must be uppercase (e.g., DMT-ACT-001)
Replace 'due to the fact that' with 'because'
Replace 'for the purpose of' with 'to' or 'for'
Replace 'initiate the preparation of' with 'begin preparing'
Subsidiary headings: only first letter and proper nouns capitalised
Table of contents must be complete and accurate
expected_value: TOC present and matching document sections

title: Use British English spelling - 'learnt' not 'learned' (past tense)
Use British English spelling - 'per cent' not 'percent'
Use British English spelling - 'spelt' not 'spelled' (past tense)
Use client's name in project docs, not 'the client'
Use comma/colon/hyphen before e.g. and i.e., no comma after
Use commas with numbers of 4+ digits (e.g., 1,000)
Use double quotes for direct speech
Use Oxford comma where needed for clarity
expected_value: Add Oxford comma where list items could be ambiguous

title: Use single quotes for special terms on first reference
Verb-led list items: capitalise first letter, end with full stop
expected_value: Capital + full stop for verb-led items

title: Visio - All Fonts Must Be Arial
Visio - Shape Fill Color Brand Blue
Year intervals: dash, no spaces, don't repeat century (e.g., 2019-20)
